CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(Most_Recent_Step__r.GoalUnit__c), "Hours", Total_Handle_Time__c * 24, "Days", Total_Handle_Time__c, "Weekdays", Cycle_Time_Weekdays__c, NULL ) / IF(Goal__r.GoalCycleTime__c = 0, NULL, Goal__r.GoalCycleTime__c)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total time spent in this process as compared with the goal for cycle time
CustomField.label: Cycle Time vs Goal
